text: AI is changing the workplace in many ways. One major impact is automation, where machines handle repetitive tasks like data entry or sorting emails. This frees employees to focus on more creative and strategic work. Productivity tools powered by AI also help workers analyse data quickly and make better decisions. However, AI is not replacing humans entirely. Instead, we see human-AI collaboration, where people and technology work together, combining human judgment with machine efficiency. Of course, these changes mean some jobs will evolve or disappear, but new roles in AI management and development will emerge. Workers will need to learn new skills to stay relevant in this shifting landscape.
